jsonLd.title: Haldiram's is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Haldiram's is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haldiram's:
Haldiram's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's!
